resources.string: Reset link sent to your email.
Enter your email to reset password
I agree to Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
Please enter valid 10 digit phone number
Please enter valid 10 digit emergency contact
Password must be at least 6 characters
Are you sure you want to logout?
Please enter accurate member information for registration
Select a membership plan that suits your fitness goals
Enter payment details to complete member registration
Add your first member to get started
Phone number cannot be changed as it\'s used as the unique identifier
App will restart to apply language changes
Create membership plans with flexible durations and pricing
• You can create plans from 1 to 12 months\n• Set competitive pricing to attract more members\n• Plans will be available immediately for member registration
Enter the membership fee for this plan
Are you sure you want to logout?
A comprehensive gym management system to manage members, plans, and payments efficiently.
Tap the + button to create your first plan
Do you want to view all your plans?
No expired or expiring plans found
Unlock all features and manage your gym smoothly
Upgrade anytime • Secure payments • No hidden charges
🚨 %s, your plan expired %d days ago! Please renew. SUSHANT GYM
⏰ %s, your plan expires today! Renew now to continue. SUSHANT GYM
⏰ %s, your plan expires in %d days. Renew soon! SUSHANT GYM
⏰ REMINDER %s! Your plan expires soon. Renew now! SUSHANT GYM
🚨 %s, your plan expired %d days ago! Please renew. SUSHANT GYM
⏰ %s, your plan expires today! Renew now. SUSHANT GYM
⏰ %s, your plan expires in %d days. Renew soon! SUSHANT GYM
⏰ REMINDER %s! Plan expires soon. Renew now! SUSHANT GYM
✅ SMS permission already granted in CollectPayment
Please search and select a member first
Payment Received: ₹%d via %s for plan %s to %s. Remaining: ₹%d. Thank you from %s!
Here is your Gym Payment Receipt 📄
⚠️ SMS permission denied - Enable manually in Settings
View current plan in member details

Your free trial has expired.

To continue using all features,
please upgrade to Premium.
Stats - Expired: %d, With Dues: %d, Total Dues: ₹%d
Are you sure? This will delete all data permanently!
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to exit?
Paid amount cannot be greater than Total Fee
ℹ️ Enable SMS permission in Settings
Welcome to %s! Membership active from %s (₹%d paid).
Welcome to Sagar Gym! Membership active from %s (₹%d paid).
This is a computer generated receipt
Starting to load plans from Firebase
Owner email is null or empty
onDataChange called, has children: %b, Children count: %d
Failed to parse plan from snapshot
Total plans loaded: %d, Total plan names: %d
No data found at this path
No plans found. Please add plans first.
No plans available. Please wait for loading.
Free trial already used. Please buy premium.
Payment was not completed.\n\nPlease try again.
Plan name must be at least 3 characters
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Select a member to collect payment
User email not found in preferences
Owner info loaded successfully from Firebase
No PDF generated. Generate report first.
No PDF viewer found. Please install a PDF viewer app.
Please find attached the payment collection report.
Storage permission denied. Cannot save PDF.
No payments found for selected period.
Please find attached the pending dues report.
No pending dues found for the selected filter.
Please find attached the expiring soon report.
No expiring members found for the selected filter.
Please find attached the monthly revenue report.
No revenue found for the selected year.
Please find attached the all members report.
No members found for the selected filter.
